module.name: no-type-assertion
module.description: Prevent use of TypeScript "as" type assertions.

scenarios.name: should allow as unknown in test files
scenarios.given: a type assertion value as unknown inside a .test.ts file

scenarios.name: should allow const assertions (as const)
scenarios.given: an expression const items = ['a', 'b'] as const

scenarios.name: should report an 'as' type assertion in a non-test source file
scenarios.given: value as SomeType in a regular .ts source file
